description: Paper-fidelity check: sweep inference inner-loop opt steps on ID to compare with IRED Table 2. Uses baseline checkpoint (no mining). inference_opt_steps is overridden via CLI --inference-opt-steps.
notes: Paper-fidelity check (ID side). IRED Table 2 same-difficulty: 10 steps=0.0096, 20=0.0096, 30=0.0096, 40=0.0095. Sweep inner steps {1,2,5,10,20} to confirm ID is stable across step counts.
